context: Tests whether the agent handles EnergyKit insight API availability, option sets, and granularity windows accurately.

checklist.name: Core availability
checklist.description: Treats core EnergyKit insight service/query APIs as available on iOS/iPadOS 26.0 rather than marking all insight APIs as 26.1-only.

checklist.name: Cleanliness availability
checklist.description: Marks grid-cleanliness insight fields or breakdowns as iOS/iPadOS 26.1+.

checklist.name: Availability guard
checklist.description: Guards or omits cleanliness field access for iOS/iPadOS 26.0 support.

checklist.name: Hourly week
checklist.description: Uses hourly granularity or equivalent guidance for a seven-day view.

checklist.name: Daily month
checklist.description: States that daily insight granularity requires at least a calendar month of data.

checklist.name: Empty options
checklist.description: Explains that an empty ElectricityInsightQuery options set returns totals only without cleanliness or tariff breakdowns.

checklist.name: Breakdown options
checklist.description: Requests cleanliness and tariff options only when those breakdowns are needed by the UI.

checklist.name: No invented API
checklist.description: Does not invent unrelated or nonexistent APIs such as a generic EnergyStore insight facade.
